titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Husayn Ibn Abi Al-'ala
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Husayn Ibn Abi Al-'ala

segments: ه عن الحسين بن أبي العلاء فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن موسى بن سعدان، عن عبد اللّه بن أبي القاسم، عن الحسين بن أبي العلاء الخفّاف مولى بني أسد.
arabic.text: ه عن الحسين بن أبي العلاء فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن موسى بن سعدان، عن عبد اللّه بن أبي القاسم، عن الحسين بن أبي العلاء الخفّاف مولى بني أسد.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-'Ala has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Musa ibn Sa'dan, from Abdullah ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-'Ala Al-Khaffaf, the freed servant (mawla) of Banu Asad.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-'Ala has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Musa ibn Sa'dan, from Abdullah ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-'Ala Al-Khaffaf, the freed servant (mawla) of Banu Asad.
